description: Kaveh from Jump Trading Group discusses FPGA acceleration for signature verification, achieving 1 million verifications per second with low latency. The presentation includes a demo of eight FPGAs processing 8 million verifications per second using only 400 watts peak power.
topic_summary: The talk covers FPGA technology, its architecture, and its application in accelerating signature verification processes, highlighting performance metrics and power efficiency [t=118.01].
